author: Simon Bigelmayr
message:
update regex for test namespaces (#82)

* Initial plan

* Update regex patterns and add comprehensive tests for nested test namespaces

Co-authored-by: simbig <26680884+simbig@users.noreply.github.com>

* chore(dependencies): downgrade phpstan and phpstan-phpunit to version 1.0

* chore(dependencies): upgrade phpstan and phpstan-phpunit to version 2.0

* refactor: update regex for test namespaces and enhance tests with a data provider

* fix data provider name

* fix data provider name

* fix: fix stan, update return type of docblock in namespaceDataProvider and add param type for testProcessNodeWithErrors

* chore(docs): remove v3.1.0 header from CHANGELOG.md and move change to master

---------

Co-authored-by: copilot-swe-agent[bot] <198982749+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: simbig <26680884+simbig@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Simon Bigelmayr <simon.bigelmayr@mll.com>
